raw_text: Run pytest with the dev group active to pick up hypothesis-based replay tests.
note: cli_remember always persists with USER lock; classifier not consulted.

raw_text: The aelf reason CLI takes a query and walks the belief graph from BM25-seeded starting points.
Edge weights for the BFS multi-hop pass are looked up by edge type, not learned.
Per-project DBs live under .git/aelfrice/brain.db so multi-project contexts do not collide.
The aelf doctor subcommand surfaces graph health and replay-equality diagnostics.
Onboard ingests project facts from a flat scan of git, README, and source structure.
Promote elevates an agent_inferred belief to user_validated origin without changing its content.
Tail prints the per-turn hook injection audit log for the most recent transcript turns.
Wonder surfaces consolidation candidates and phantom-belief suggestions over the belief graph.
Search returns locked beliefs first, then BM25-ranked unlocked beliefs.
